summary: iOS | Intermittent | DFU/Language Change fails at >90%
scenario: DFU or Language Change fails at >90% completion, causing firmware to revert after restart or language to revert after brief use
description_clean: Intermittent DFU (Device Firmware Update) or Language Change fails at >90% completion. After a failed DFU, the device shows as up to date but reverts to outdated firmware after restart. After a failed Language Change, the device may briefly use the new language then restart and revert to the previous language. This issue is intermittent and does not occur every time.
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Navigate to Home screen and ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. Go to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Firmware Update.
4. Initiate a Device Firmware Update (DFU) and allow it to progress past 90% completion.
5. Observe whether the DFU completes successfully or fails after 90%.
6. If the DFU fails, check the device status in the app — note that the device may show as 'Up to date'.
8. Reconnect the device and navigate to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Firmware Update to check the firmware version.
9. Alternatively, navigate to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Language and initiate a Language Change.
10. Allow the language change to progress past 90% completion and observe the result.
11. If the language change fails, check if the device briefly uses the new language.
12. Restart the device and check which language is active.
13. Repeat steps 4–12 multiple times to confirm the intermittent nature of the issue.
expected: DFU completes successfully past 90% and the device retains the updated firmware after restart. Language Change completes successfully and the new language persists after device restart.
actual: DFU fails after >90% completion. After failure, the device shows as up to date but reverts to outdated firmware after restart. Language Change fails after >90% completion; the device may briefly use the new language but reverts to the previous language after restart. Issue is intermittent.
